title: Seoul shares plummet 5.4 pct on extended tech losses
description: Seoul shares plummeted 5.4 percent Wednesday as technology stocks extended their losses and investors reassessed the outlook for artificial intelligence (AI) trade.
content:

title: Samsung confirms Galaxy Unpacked event date; Galaxy Z Fold 8, Z Fold 8 Ultra and Z Flip 8 foldables expected to debut
description: Samsung's next Galaxy Unpacked event is scheduled for July 22 in London. The company will unveil new foldable smartphones and other Galaxy devices. These upcoming devices will integrate artificial intelligence capabilities for personalized experiences. The event will begin at 6:30 pm IST and be livestreamed online. Samsung aims to set a new standard for the AI era with these innovations.

title: "Visit has opened new avenues for cooperation": PM Modi concludes 3
description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi on Wednesday (local time) said his 3-day visit to Indonesia from July 6-8 had 'opened new avenues for cooperation' across key sectors, including defence, maritime collaboration, artificial intelligence and digital innovation, as he concluded his trip to the Southeast Asian nation.

title: Temasek Amplifies AI Investment to Propel Future Growth
description: Temasek is increasing its focus on artificial intelligence, planning to boost AI-related investments to 15% of its portfolio by 2031. This strategic move aims to leverage emerging tech for sustainable returns, building on past successes from digital trends and navigating challenges in its global portfolio.
content: Singapore’s state-owned investment powerhouse, Temasek, is significantly enhancing its investment in artificial intelligence, with plans to ramp up AI-related holdings from 6% to 15% of its portfolio by 2031. This strategic endeavor comes as Temasek ... [1003 chars]

title: Singapore's Temasek to ramp up AI exposure as its portfolio value hits record high
description: Temasek said it has benefited from the digitisation wave in the past and that it viewed the advancement of AI as a pivotal phase that will create new opportunities. The company has identified five focus areas to deploy capital in artificial intelligence.
content:
Singapore, July 8, (ANI): Singapore's state-backed investor Temasek is betting big on artificial intelligence as it scopes opportunities in emerging technologies to deliver sustainable returns.

title: Arunkumar Raman's Hotel Growth Hub Leads India's AI
description: Chennai (Tamil Nadu) [India], July 8: Artificial Intelligence, Google Search, changing traveller behaviour, and increasing dependence on Online Travel Agencies (OTAs) are redefining how hotels attract guests and grow their business. While large hotel brands continue to invest heavily in technology and digital marketing, thousands of independent hotels are searching for practical ways to remain competitive.

title: Oil prices jump more than 2% after US strikes on Iran, while world shares retreat
description: Shares are mostly lower in Europe and Asia and oil prices surged more than 2% after the U.S. launched strikes on Iran. Stocks in South Korea dipped 5.4% following a retreat on Wall Street as the AI roller-coaster took tech shares sharply lower. On Tuesday, the S&P 500 fell 0.4% even though the majority of stocks within the index rose. The downturn for artificial-intelligence-related stocks dragged the Nasdaq composite down 1.2%. The Dow Jones Industrial Average dipped 0.2%. AI stocks worldwide have been swinging because of worries their prices have shot too high. Stocks also felt pressure from rising oil prices. The latest strikes on Iran followed attacks on three ships in the Strait of Hormuz.
content:
BANGKOK (AP) — Shares fell Wednesday in Europe and Asia and oil prices surged more than 2% after the U.S. launched strikes on Iran following attacks on three ships in the Strait of Hormuz.
Brent crude, the international standard, jumped 2.2% to $75.8... [1267 chars]

title: AI expected to unlock up to 35% in profitability for Indian MSMEs; Nearly 60% to achieve double
description: Artificial intelligence integration promises significant profit improvements for Indian MSMEs. Digital adoption helps nearly sixty percent of these businesses achieve double-digit revenue growth. Expanded market access and improved customer acquisition are key benefits reported by MSMEs. Digital advertising by MSMEs contributes substantially to the national economy. Technology adoption is crucial for strengthening skilling and formalization efforts.
